headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 5, 2026**
article:
The New York Mets secured a 4-2 victory over the Colorado Rockies, with Carson Benge leading the offense and Juan Mejia impressing in relief. The Boston Red Sox edged the Detroit Tigers 5-4, with Payton Tolle earning the win and Jarren Duran leading the Red Sox offense. The Tampa Bay Rays shut down the Toronto Blue Jays 5-1, with Nick Martinez earning the win and Ryan Vilade leading the Blue Jays with a home run and 3 RBIs.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Texas Rangers second baseman Josh Smith, who has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right glute strain. The Tampa Bay Rays have also placed left-hander Steven Matz on the 15-day injured list with left elbow inflammation. Other teams have made roster moves, including the Atlanta Braves trading catcher Jonah Heim to the Athletics for cash and the Washington Nationals trading third baseman Zack Short to the Detroit Tigers for cash.

The Philadelphia Phillies took down the Miami Marlins 1-0, with Aaron Nola earning the win and Bryce Harper leading the Phillies' offense. The Los Angeles Dodgers acquired second baseman Tyler Fitzgerald from the Toronto Blue Jays for cash.

top_news.title: **Mets Take Down Rockies 4-2**
top_news.summary: The New York Mets secured a 4-2 victory over the Colorado Rockies, with Carson Benge leading the offense with a home run and one RBI. Juan Mejia impressed in relief, striking out five batters in two scoreless innings.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Edge Tigers in Thrilling 5-4 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, with Payton Tolle earning the win after 7.0 innings of scoreless relief. Jarren Duran led the Red Sox offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance.

top_news.title: **Rays Shut Down Blue Jays 5-1**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 5-1 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Nick Martinez earning the win after pitching 5.0 innings with 4 strikeouts and 1 earned run. Ryan Vilade led the Blue Jays with 1 hit, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Phillies Take Down Marlins in Low-Scoring Affair**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies secured a 1-0 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Aaron Nola earning the win after pitching 6.0 innings with 5 strikeouts and 0 earned runs. Bryce Harper led the Phillies' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance.

top_news.title: **Rockies Shut Down Mets in Scoreless Tie**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies took home a 0-0 win against the New York Mets, securing a victory in a game that saw no standout hitters or pitchers.

top_news.title: **Rangers Place Josh Smith on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Texas Rangers second baseman Josh Smith has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right glute strain, effective retroactive to May 4, 2026.

top_news.title: **Braves Make Roster Move Ahead of Series**
top_news.summary: The Atlanta Braves have made a trade, sending catcher Jonah Heim to the Athletics in exchange for cash.
